changes: CHANGE-001: Replaced **:w-auto **:max-w-full **:h-full **:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:**:max-h-[26px] md:**:max-h-[58px] with *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] in both the ImageDropUploader className (line 533) and the logo <a> className (line 544).

CHANGE-002: Added startHeight -= parseInt(iframeWin!.getComputedStyle(header).marginTop, 10) || 0 in editor calculateStartHeight() after sibling height summation, so fixed mode triggers when the margin-top area scrolls past viewport top.

CHANGE-001: Replaced **:w-auto **:max-w-full **:h-full **:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:**:max-h-[26px] md:**:max-h-[58px] with *:w-auto *:max-w-full *:h-full *:object-contain shrink-0 max-md:*:max-h-[26px] md:*:max-h-[58px] in logo <a> class (line 76).

CHANGE-002: Added startHeight -= parseInt(window.getComputedStyle(header).marginTop, 10) || 0 in calculateStartHeight() after admin bar height is added, so fixed mode triggers when the margin-top area scrolls past viewport top.

syncStatus.notes: Pre-existing structure difference warning at depth 1 is unrelated to these changes.

fixesApplied.description: Changed Tailwind ** (all descendants) selector to * (direct children) for logo max-height constraints in both TSX (2 occurrences) and PHP (1 occurrence).

Subtracted header margin-top from startHeight threshold in both HeaderMain.js and HeaderMain.tsx calculateStartHeight() functions so fixed mode activates when the top margin area reaches the viewport top.
